title: Add healthcare generator unit tests for branches and fallback
description: Current: there are no tests for healthcare vertical behavior. Expected: unit coverage validates required fields, healthcare-specific branch behavior, tagline handling, and fallback logic in the same implementation stream.
acceptance_criteria: Test suite asserts required output shape and minimum list lengths for healthcare generator output
Tests cover at least one style-specific branch and unknown-style fallback behavior
Tests include no-tagline scenario to prevent undefined leakage in summary text
out_of_scope: Testing MCP transport or HTTP routing
completion_summary: Healthcare unit test suite covers branch behavior, fallback handling, and no-tagline summary safety.
